articles.title: Palace handed Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago
articles.description: Thousands of emails containing information about the former prince's financial dealings were given to the Royal Household in 2020.

articles.title: Attorney general had 'no doubt' on reviewing teen boys' rape sentences
